package rulecoverage

func NegativeBootstrapBuildsClientsInsideRouteRegistration() string {
    ruleID := "bootstrap_builds_clients_inside_route_registration"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Startup code that hides dependency construction inside route registration functions."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
